dataset.name: Open-source BOS tomography dataset of high-speed flow over a flight body

partition.role: Only views permitted in reconstruction, optimization, forward-model fitting, regularization selection on support residuals, and checkpoint updates.
The only external views permitted for model-family choice, stopping-rule choice, calibration of practical margins, or rejection before final audit.
Primary final audit: independent rotation runs using the same physical camera ids as the nine-view support set.
Secondary camera-layout audit on the three rotation runs used by reconstruction, using cameras excluded from support.
Stress audit with both unseen rotations and cameras excluded from support.

primary_endpoint.aggregation: Pool cameras 2, 3, and 4 within each rotation, then treat the six unseen rotations as six paired experimental blocks.
primary_endpoint.comparison: candidate versus frozen B0 fixed-domain reference
primary_endpoint.name: rotation_block_active_vector_relative_l2

reporting_rules: Report every audit view and every independent rotation block; no pooled-only result.
Do not bootstrap pixels as independent experiments.
No field-L2 claim is allowed because the experimental dataset has no independent 3D density truth.
A lower held-out residual establishes image-space consistency, not unique recovery of the true 3D field.
Qualitative shock images cannot override a failed primary or tail gate.
B1 axis, vertex, and angle may not be selected using the parameter-sensitivity audit.

success_gate.ambient_gate: Pooled ambient predicted-deflection RMS may not increase versus B0.
success_gate.calibration_gate: The primary sign gate must remain satisfied under the frozen calibration perturbation audit. If calibration covariance or repeat target data are unavailable, experimental superiority remains locked.
success_gate.practical_significance_gate: The median active-vector RMSE reduction across the six rotation blocks must exceed the flow-off repeatability floor estimated on development data with the same averaging and masking procedure.
success_gate.primary_sign_gate: The candidate must lower the primary endpoint in all six audit_rotation_same_cameras rotation blocks. Under a predeclared one-sided exact sign test this corresponds to p = 1/64 = 0.015625.
success_gate.tail_gate: The candidate may not worsen active vector-error p95 by more than the development-estimated repeatability floor in any primary audit rotation block.
